title: echinospermum lappula var. consanguineum
intro: Echinospermum lappula var. consanguineum, also known as Echinospermum, is a flowering plant species within the family Boraginaceae. It is primarily found in Europe and Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Echinospermum is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to alleviate digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, offering health benefits like reduced inflammation and improved immune function.
